hero.title: Your Personal AI Team for
hero.description: One simple software to handle every customer query across WhatsApp, Email, and more. 100% private, stays on your computer, and starts for free.

features.title: Simple. Smart. Secure.
features.subtitle: Stop losing leads while you sleep. Our software turns your WhatsApp and Email into a fully automated customer support and sales machine.

items.title: Data Privacy Guaranteed
items.desc: The software runs entirely on your laptop. Your customer chats and business secrets never leave your office or go to the cloud.

items.title: One Inbox for Everything
items.desc: Manage every WhatsApp chat, Email inquiry, and lead from a single dashboard. No more switching between apps to find your customers.

items.title: Automatic Expert Knowledge
items.desc: Simply drop your price list or FAQ into the dashboard. The AI learns your business in seconds and answers customers with zero mistakes.

items.title: Safe & Human-Like
items.desc: Our 'Stealth-Logic' imitates human typing speeds and gaps, making sure your WhatsApp and Email accounts stay safe and trusted.

items.title: Ready for Your Industry
items.desc: Pre-built settings for Clinics, Salons, and Trades. It already knows the difference between a 'Trim' and a 'Root Touch-up'.

items.title: Evening Voice Reports
items.desc: Get a simple voice note sent to your phone every evening summarizing your day's sales, happy customers, and pending tasks.

process.title: Set Up in 3 Minutes.
process.subtitle: No technical skills required. If you can use WhatsApp Web or check an email, you can use AIConsumerAgent.

steps.title: Connect Your Accounts
steps.desc: Install the app, scan your WhatsApp QR code, and link your email in seconds with our simple onboarding wizard.

steps.title: Teach the AI
steps.desc: Upload a PDF or Excel sheet of your prices. Tell the AI your business name and how you like to talk to customers.

steps.title: Watch it Grow
steps.desc: Sit back while your AI Agent greets customers, takes bookings, and handles emails 24/7 across all channels.

verticals.title: Tailored for Your Business.
verticals.subtitle: No matter what you do, our AI understands your industry's specific needs and talks to your customers like an expert.

footer.description: The simple way to automate your customer support and sales across WhatsApp and Email. Private, secure, and always on for your business.
footer.tagline: The Multi-Channel AI Assistant for Local Business Owners
